title: podman install run on win 10 failure in name resolution
body:
### Issue Description


podman run ubi8-micro date
Resolved "ubi8-micro" as an alias (/etc/containers/registries.conf.d/000-shortnames.conf)
Trying to pull registry.access.redhat.com/ubi8-micro:latest...
Error: initializing source docker://registry.access.redhat.com/ubi8-micro:latest: pinging container registry registry.access.redhat.com: Get "https://registry.access.redhat.com/v2/": dial tcp: lookup registry.access.redhat.com: Temporary failure in name resolution

C:\Users\user1>ping registry.access.redhat.com

Pinging e40408.d.akamaiedge.net [23.50.233.112] with 32 bytes of data:
Reply from 23.50.233.112: bytes=32 time=46ms TTL=56


### Steps to reproduce the issue

Steps to reproduce the issue
1.install on windows 10 desktop
2.
3.


### Describe the results you received

Error: initializing source docker://registry.access.redhat.com/ubi8-micro:latest: pinging container registry registry.access.redhat.com: Get "https://registry.access.redhat.com/v2/": dial tcp: lookup registry.access.redhat.com: Temporary failure in name resolution

### Describe the results you expected

Describe the results you expected

comments.body: Are you using a proxy? Maybe related: https://github.com/containers/podman/discussions/16693, https://github.com/containers/podman/issues/17733

> 

no proxy
fixed with https://github.com/lleongl update  https://github.com/containers/podman/discussions/16693#discussioncomment-5337355
Resolved working now
